hard_stops.logic: entity purpose is required before entity formation analysis can proceed
entity has missed annual filings — state may administratively dissolve
beneficial ownership information report is overdue — FinCEN compliance violation

soft_flags.logic: annual filings are due within 30 days — prepare and submit to maintain good standing
entity is operating in states where it is not registered as a foreign entity
tax election deadline is within 30 days — S-corp, partnership, or REIT election may be needed
registered agent service renewal is due within 60 days — lapse may cause missed legal service
